Our story

Rooted in Sicily. Growing in Melbourne.

A fourth-generation gardening family who treat every plant as a living masterpiece and every garden as their own.

Our philosophy

Gardens that grow with care.

We believe every plant is a living thing worth respecting — not simply managing. That belief drives everything from how we approach a fortnightly maintenance visit to how we design a full garden renovation.

Our team arrives prepared, pays attention, and leaves a garden better than we found it. We don't rush. We don't cut corners. We work the way Leonardo's grandfather Rosario taught him to: with patience, skill, and a genuine love for the living world.

  • Genuine horticultural knowledge, not guesswork
  • Species-aware pruning and planting decisions
  • Eco-friendly, natural-first pest control
  • The same trusted faces, every single visit
  • Honest, transparent communication with every client

Heritage

Four generations of craft.

Leonardo grew up among the olive groves of southern Sicily, where his grandfather Rosario taught him to tend a garden the way a family tends a name — with patience, with specificity, and with a long view of what you are actually building.

Today the same craft is practised here in Melbourne, by the same small team, on the day we said we would.

Leonardo Qucco

Founder
Read our story

The Team

A small team that
genuinely cares.

We're a close-knit, fully-equipped crew who turn up reliably, work with real skill, and treat your garden — and your home — with respect.

The same friendly faces, every visit. We notice when your camellias need attention, we remember the names of your trees, and we take pride in leaving every garden better than we found it.

Book a consultation

Get in touch

Let's grow something beautiful together.

Tell us a little about your garden and we'll be in touch to arrange a free, no-obligation quote.
